cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to track where each player ends up after all the swaps. There are a few steps here, so I need to make sure I follow each one carefully. First, let me list out the initial positions: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Now, the swaps happen in this order: 1. Dave and Eve trade positions. 2. Claire and Bob trade positions. 3. Alice and Bob trade positions. 4. Eve and Dave trade positions. 5. Bob and Alice trade positions. Let me track each step one by one. Starting with the first swap: Dave and Eve. So after this, Dave is now goalkeeper and Eve is left winger. Second swap: Claire and Bob. Claire was right midfielder, Bob was center midfielder. After swap, Claire is center midfielder and Bob is right midfielder. Third swap: Alice and Bob. Alice was fullback, Bob is right midfielder (from previous swap). So now Alice is right midfielder and Bob is fullback. Fourth swap: Eve and Dave. After the first swap, Eve was left winger and Dave was goalkeeper. Now they swap again, so Eve is goalkeeper and Dave is left winger. Wait, but that's back to their original positions? Or did they swap again? Let me check. First swap: Dave (left winger) and Eve (goalkeeper) swapped. Then fourth swap says Eve and Dave trade positions again. So yes, swapping them back to original. So after fourth swap, Eve is back to goalkeeper and Dave is back to left winger. Fifth swap: Bob and Alice. Let's see where they are. After third swap, Alice was right midfielder and Bob was fullback. Swapping them again would put Alice back to fullback and Bob back to right midfielder? Wait, but there was a previous swap where Claire and Bob swapped, then Alice and Bob swapped. So let me retrace. Let me try to track each player step by step: Initial positions: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper After first swap (Dave and Eve): - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger After second swap (Claire and Bob): - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger After third swap (Alice and Bob): - Alice: right midfielder (from Bob's position) - Bob: fullback (from Alice's position) - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger After fourth swap (Eve and Dave): - Alice: right
